chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-2285 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For hearing of main case. 10.02.2025 Mr. Ghulam Sarwar Baloch A.A.G. for Pakistan. Mr. Habibur Rehman Dashti Assistant Director (Legal) NADRA. None present for the petitioner. No intimation is received. This petition was filed in the year 2017 and lastly it was came up in Court on 18.09.2019 where on that date, Mr. Khalid Hussain advocate was holding brief for counsel for the petitioner. Thereafter no efforts were made to proceed with this petition. The conduct of the petitioner shows that he has lost interest in the proceedings. Consequently, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
